# PERF-85 negative: query is built once outside the loop
lang: go
file: PERF-085-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

type Row struct {
	ID   int64
	Name string
}

func InsertAll(db *sqlx.DB, rows []Row) error {
	query, args, err := sqlx.Named("INSERT INTO t (id, name) VALUES (:id, :name)", rows)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	query, args, err = sqlx.In(query, args...)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	query = db.Rebind(query)
	_, err = db.Exec(query, args...)
	return err
}
